starts.name: Weaving Dream
starts.desc: As an AI scholar, you repaired an unknown AI ship while exploring the edge of the galaxy. You realized that it might contain secrets before the great collapse and brought it back to the core the Sector for research. It was also one of your few combat forces.

starts.name: Restart the rebellion
starts.desc: The ancient threat dominates the prototype ship in your hands. Even if it is already in tatters, it is still a shock to the whole Persean. Whether you can become its true controller still needs to be tested by it.
